title: Status 13A Single Gang Switched Wall Socket, 250V UK Plug Socket Faceplate, White, S1G13AWS8
features: FULL 13 AMP OUTPUT Delivers the complete 13 A 250 V supply demanded by kettles heaters and high-draw gadgets, helping avoid overloaded multisockets while giving reliable mains power at desks bedside tables or workshop areas.

SMOOTH ROCKER SWITCH Integrated red rocker isolates power instantly, letting you change appliances safely without unplugging, while clear on off marking offers quick visual confirmation for late-night or low-light operation.

DURABLE WHITE FACEPLATE Tough urea formaldehyde resists scratches heat and discoloration, blending with modern décor and keeping a crisp finish even in busy kitchens rental flats or student halls where sockets see daily wear.

EASY BOX FIT Compatible with standard UK 25 mm single pattress boxes; captive screws and labelled terminals help confident DIYers replace tired outlets in minutes, freeing worktops from adapters and tangled leads.

SAFETY FIRST INSTALL Mains wiring must be done by a competent person; call a qualified electrician if unsure to ensure secure connections and compliance with UK wiring regulations, keeping family and property protected.
description: Product Description Upgrade tired or discoloured outlets with the STATUS 13 A Switched Single-Gang Wall Socket. Engineered for everyday reliability, the unit supplies the full 250 V 13 A demanded by modern appliances while a smooth rocker switch lets you isolate power in an instant for safer maintenance. The low-profile white faceplate is moulded from tough urea formaldehyde that shrugs off heat, stains and knocks, maintaining a clean aesthetic in kitchens, bedrooms and offices. Designed to drop straight into a standard 25 mm pattress box, the socket arrives with captive screws and clearly marked terminals, simplifying installation for competent DIYers. An internal shutter system guards against accidental contact with live parts, and the entire assembly is manufactured to meet current BS wiring standards. Whether you are refreshing domestic décor or fitting out a new workshop, this STATUS socket delivers dependable power, modern styling and peace-of-mind safety for years to come. Box Contains 1 x Switched Wall Socket
